rules.name: Yes_Program_Base_Onboarding_Active
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7 OR 8)

rightValue.stringValue: Program Base Application - with Chuzo (No Personal Guarantee)

rules.label: Yes - Program Base In Progress

decisions.name: Has_OnboardingIds_For_ProgramBase_Requirements
decisions.label: Has OnboardingIds For Program Base Requirements

rules.name: Yes_Has_OnboardingIds_For_Bulk_Requirement_Query
rules.label: Yes - Has Onboarding Ids For Bulk Requirement Query

decisions.name: Program_Base_Background_Req_Singleton_Still_Empty
decisions.label: Program Base Background Req Singleton Still Empty

decisions.name: Program_Base_Credit_Req_Singleton_Still_Empty
decisions.label: Program Base Credit Req Singleton Still Empty

decisions.name: Program_Base_Credit_And_Background_Satisfied_Decision
decisions.label: Program Base Credit and Background Requirements Satisfied
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Requirements Incomplete - Treat as Active Pipeline

rules.name: Yes_Both_Checks_Complete_Or_Waived
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND (3 OR 4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7 OR 8)
rules.label: Yes - Both Requirement Checks Satisfied

decisions.name: Are_Training_Assignment_Onboarding_Links_Found_for_Training_Assignment
decisions.label: Are Training Assignment Onboarding Links Found for Training Assignment
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No - Use Legacy Training Assignment Onboarding

decisions.name: Find_Not_Included_Values
decisions.label: Find Not Included Values
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No - Do Not Find Not Included Values

decisions.name: HasAnyOboardingForAccount_Decision
decisions.label: HasAnyOboardingForAccount Decision
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No Onboarding Record for Account Found
